title: caltha palustris lusus minima
intro: Caltha palustris lusus minima, also known as the lesser marsh marigold, is a lesser-known variant of the common marsh marigold plant, characterized by its smaller size and unique appearance. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, the lesser marsh marigold has been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of caltha palustris lusus minima include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be administered internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
